meaning: adj.[修]突降法的,突减的(兴趣等),虎头蛇尾的
examples: Seems a bit anticlimactic, doesn't it?
It's almost anticlimactic to write an implementation of this new interface.
There are no inspirational speeches, and every climax turns out to be anticlimactic.
More proof that when a movie fad runs out of gas, it occasionally brings forth a final, anticlimactic belch.
